name: BI-RADS (Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: BI-RADS classification template for breast imaging assessment

rads.assessment: Suspicious abnormality - biopsy should be considered
rads.lesionLocation: [Right/Left] breast, [upper outer/upper inner/lower outer/lower inner/central] quadrant

findings.technique: [Digital mammography / 3D tomosynthesis / breast MRI / breast ultrasound] performed. [CC and MLO views / standard sequences] obtained.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior mammogram / prior MRI / prior US] from [date].
findings.limitations: Dense breast tissue [present/absent] may limit sensitivity.

sections.name: Breast Composition
sections.content: Breast density: [a: almost entirely fatty / b: scattered areas of fibroglandular density / c: heterogeneously dense / d: extremely dense].

sections.name: Architectural Distortion
sections.content: Architectural distortion: [present/absent]. Associated with [mass/calcifications/no associated finding].

sections.name: Asymmetry
sections.content: Asymmetry: [present/absent]. Type: [asymmetry/focal asymmetry/developed asymmetry]. [Concerning / Not concerning] for malignancy.

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Skin changes: [present/absent]. Nipple retraction: [present/absent]. Axillary lymphadenopathy: [present/absent].

impression:
1. BI-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Location] abnormality measuring [X]cm
3. [Description of findings]
4. [Clinical / Imaging] correlation recommended
5. [Biopsy / Surgical consultation / Follow-up] recommended
author: RadReport Templates
